title: EasyPotion
description: Makes using health potions quick and easy.
body:
# EasyPotion 🧪

EasyPotion is a lightweight Minecraft utility mod that makes potion handling faster and smarter.  
Designed for PvP and survival players who want instant reactions without losing time switching slots.

## ⭐ Features
- **Auto-Switch After Throwing**  
  When you throw a health potion on the ground, the mod automatically switches to your next available potion slot.

- **Configurable Target Slot**  
  You can set a slot number (e.g., `3`).  
  When you move to that slot:
  - **Randomize ON:** the mod swaps your current potion to a *random* potion slot.  
  - **Randomize OFF:** the mod moves your potion to the *last available slot* (8 → 7 → 6 …).

- **Only On Throw Mode**  
  Enabling **Only On Throw** makes the mod *only* switch to the next potion when you throw one.  
  - Slot selection features are **disabled** in this mode.  
  - Perfect for players who want pure auto-switching without slot logic.

- **Simple, Clean & Efficient**  
  No bloated menus. Just fast automated potion cycling for smoother gameplay.

## 📦 Required Library
EasyPotion requires **Cloth Config** to run.  
Download it from Modrinth:  
👉 https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config

## ⚙️ How It Works
1. Throw a splash health potion.  
2. EasyPotion instantly moves you to the next potion (and optionally manages slots if configuration is enabled).  
3. Switching to your configured slot triggers slot logic (unless **Only On Throw** is active).
